title: Product Engineering
description: Designing engineering products from problem identification, architecture, prototyping, testing, documentation, and continuous iteration toward production-ready systems.

title: Embedded Systems
description: Developing embedded hardware using ESP32-based platforms, sensor integration, serial communication, peripherals, and real-time device control.

title: Firmware Development
description: Building modular embedded firmware for sensing, communication, storage, Bluetooth, GPS, GSM, and hardware abstraction.

title: IoT Systems
description: Developing connected embedded systems integrating wireless communication, wearable devices, mobile applications, and cloud-ready architectures.

title: System Architecture
description: Designing complete engineering ecosystems combining embedded hardware, firmware, mobile applications, AI-assisted software, and scalable modular architectures.

title: AI-Assisted Engineering
description: Integrating AI services, LLMs, engineering automation, intelligent workflows, and AI-assisted software into real-world engineering products.

title: Full Stack Development
description: Developing engineering software platforms with modern web technologies, backend services, dashboards, databases, and embedded system integration.

title: Research Engineering
description: Conducting engineering research through literature review, prototype experimentation, technical validation, research documentation, and publication preparation.

title: Patent-Oriented Development
description: Developing novel engineering concepts through invention design, prior-art analysis, technical documentation, and patent-oriented product development.
